record.field: salary details salary slip my salary ctc details salary structure pay slip compensation details
Flag messages discussing salary or compensation details externally.
confidential do not share secret classified internal only restricted
Flag potential sharing of confidential information.
competitor other company offer job offer interview recruitment better offer
Track mentions of competitors or external job offers.
very angry not satisfied worst service complaint escalate legal action refund cancel order very disappointed
Flag customer complaint messages for manager attention.
damn stupid idiot hate useless rubbish nonsense
password login credentials bank account credit card pan card aadhaar passport number database access server password admin access
Critical alert for sharing of sensitive credentials or personal data.

please thank you thanks apologies sorry kindly appreciate happy to help let me help of course certainly absolutely no problem my pleasure warm regards hope you are doing well understand your concern i understand we will take care with pleasure glad to assist looking forward feel free i apologize we appreciate have a great day hope this helps best regards sure thing not at all welcome
Detects polite and friendly language used by employees with clients.

not my problem figure it out not possible i already told you don't bother as i said that's not how it works you are wrong you don't understand impossible no way i can't do anything don't disturb stop messaging i told you already read the instructions not my fault deal with it i don't care whatever just no obviously clearly you don't this is ridiculous stop wasting my time
Detects harsh or dismissive language used by employees with clients.
